attachments.fallback: How to Handle Performance Issues When Animations Run on Older Devices in Fuse? - @kayoj
attachments.text:
Hello

While testing a Fuse-based app, I noticed that animations which run smoothly on modern devices start to lag or stutter on older phones. :slightly_smiling_face: This becomes more noticeable when multiple animations or transitions overlap, such as during screen changes with background effects. :innocent:

I’ve optimized assets as much as possible, but I’m wondering if the issue is more about how the animations are structur…
